subtasks.description: Query the spend database to identify the top 3 publishers by total spend in fiscal year 2024, ordered by spend descending with publisher name and total amount

plan.cost_rationale: This is a straightforward single-table aggregation query requiring a GROUP BY publisher, filtering on fiscal year 2024, and sorting by total spend. No joins, cross-source reconciliation, or complex logic required. Small tier is sufficient for this basic aggregation task."

output.sql: SELECT cf.publisher, SUM(cf.amount_usd) as total_spend FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY cf.publisher ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 3
